_doc: Kokoro-82M regression fixture (sc-12854): deterministic request -> metric envelope + PCM repeatability hash. Numbers only — generated media stays out of git. Envelope bands were set from real measured runs on the canonical platform (macos/aarch64, Candle CPU); the committed pcm_sha256 is asserted exactly on that platform and reported (with intra-process repeatability still asserted) elsewhere. Regenerate by running the test with --nocapture and reviewing the printed measurements.
_measured_reference: 4 independent processes x 3 runs each on macos/aarch64 (Candle CPU, debug profile), 2026-07-18: duration 3.175s, -25.93 LUFS, -9.50 dBTP, 0 clipped, identical hash in all 12 runs; first-run latency 3.96-4.03s, steady 3.19-3.27s, warmup overhead ~0.74-0.78s, peak RSS ~1007-1011 MiB.
script: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
